title: Slash command ecosystem (~200 commands)
description:
CC has ~200 command files in commands/ covering git (/commit, /branch, /autofix-pr), session (/compact, /dream, /clear, /resume), development (/bughunter, /review, /remember), etc. OC has ~6 core ones in cli/repl/slash.rs.

## Scope
- Expand cli/repl/slash.rs to a commands/ directory
- Prioritize: /commit (compose + execute), /compact (manual trigger), /review (PR/branch review), /remember (memory update), /resume (session picker UI), /clear (conversation reset), /dream (memory consolidation)
- Each command in its own module with a CommandDef trait (name, description, handler)

## References
- /home/doll/claude-code/commands/
- /home/doll/claude-code/commands.ts (registry)
